ddls:
CREATE TABLE "atlases" (
  "atlas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atlas */,
  "atlas_name" TEXT /* Name of the brain atlas */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the atlas */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the atlas */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the atlas was published */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation information for the atlas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atlas_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the experimental condition (e.g., task-based, resting-state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the neuroimaging study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of the study (e.g., longitudinal, cross-sectional) */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., within-subjects, between-subjects) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the participant is involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant (e.g., neurological conditions, medications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant involved in the session */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experimental condition of the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the session was conducted */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collected during the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "scanning_parameters" TEXT /* Scanning parameters used during the session (e.g., TR, TE, flip angle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES experimental_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session the image is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the neuroimaging image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., T1-weighted, T2-weighted, diffusion-weighted) */,
  "contrast_agent" TEXT /* Contrast agent used during imaging (e.g., gadolinium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., institution, department) */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being processed */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was processed */,
  "processing_software" TEXT /* Software used for processing (e.g., FSL, AFNI) */,
  "processing_steps" TEXT /* Processing steps applied (e.g., motion correction, normalization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being checked */,
  "qc_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was checked */,
  "qc_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "qc_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the quality control check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study resulting in the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was released */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
